creator: freebsd@knarf.de
text:
The currently distributed Windows version of Wormux is 0.8.3 which
is not compatible to the latest FreeBSD version 0.8.1.
See: http://www.wormux.org/wiki/download.php?/en/

Fix: This fix is very easy. It compiles, installs and runs fine.
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to connect wormux from FreeBSD to Windows (or the other direction).
